mainEntity.name: What metrics show AEO failure in Los Angeles?
mainEntity.text: What metrics show AEO failure in Los Angeles?

acceptedAnswer.text: Failure metrics: <5% AI impression share, no citations in 6 months, stagnant leads despite optimization for LA firms.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Monitor zero-growth in AI traffic, high bounce from referrals. Pivot via re-audits. LA competition hides slow fails; set 90-day kill switches. Agencies blame external factors—demand accountability.[1]

name: Signs of AEO Failure in LA
description: Failure metrics: <5% AI impression share, no citations in 6 months, stagnant leads despite optimization for LA firms.[3]
